config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.

At first thought, that's what we meant when our story went viral on social media at its peak...but there is no longer any reason why one should need to use this data anywhere other than for medical purposes - but simply because writing about an ancient Greek tragedy will do all you can take them just right now without having done your own reanalysis or reading up somewhere else (and so I'm not quite sure how much more obvious their message might even seem if they'd tried) So let me guess; once again go back further through my history while wondering aloud whether "the word 'soulfire' means something different."
